---
title: "cortical_thickness"
generated: true
description: "Per-vertex cortical thickness between the white and pial surfaces."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.surface`](../nitrix-geometry-surface.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cortical_thickness -->
```python
cortical_thickness(white: Mesh, pial: Mesh, *, method: Literal['symmetric', 'correspondence'] = 'symmetric') -> Float[Array, 'n_vertices']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cortical_thickness -->
Per-vertex cortical thickness between the white and pial surfaces.

Requires the two surfaces to be in **vertex correspondence** (equal vertex
counts, `white[i]` paired with `pial[i]` -- as produced by
[`deform_to_sdf`](../nitrix-geometry-surface/deform_to_sdf.qmd) marching a white surface to a pial SDF).

- `'correspondence'` -- $\lVert \mathrm{pial}_i -
  \mathrm{white}_i \rVert$ per vertex.  Exact when the pial was deformed
  from the white; pure JAX and **differentiable** with respect to both
  meshes' vertices.
- `'symmetric'` (default, Fischl & Dale 2000) -- the average of the
  nearest white-to-pial-surface and pial-to-white-surface distances.
  Host-side nearest-point queries (not differentiable); more robust when
  the normal-correspondence is imperfect.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cortical_thickness -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `white` | `Mesh` | — | — | Surfaces in vertex correspondence (equal vertex counts). |
| `pial` | `Mesh` | — | — | Surfaces in vertex correspondence (equal vertex counts). |
| `method` | `Literal['symmetric', 'correspondence']` | — | `'symmetric'` | `'symmetric'` (default) or `'correspondence'`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_vertices`. Per-vertex cortical thickness, shape `(n_vertices,)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:cortical_thickness -->
### References

Fischl, B., & Dale, A. M. (2000). Measuring the thickness of the human
cerebral cortex from magnetic resonance images. *Proceedings of the
National Academy of Sciences*, 97(20), 11050-11055.
`10.1073/pnas.200033797`
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:cortical_thickness -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
